Everything you need to dominate

14 AI-powered tools. One platform. Zero excuses.

🧠

AI Quiz Generator

Paste notes → get instant MCQs with difficulty control, explanations, and adaptive retries.

📊

Scorecard Analyzer

Upload your marksheet — AI reads it, ranks subjects, and shows placement readiness.

📄

ATS Resume Checker

Match your resume against any JD. See missing keywords, get AI-rewritten bullets.

📞

Voice Calling Agent

Score low on a quiz? Your phone rings. AI calls you with a personalized study plan.

🔍

RAG Gap Detector

Notes vs syllabus — find what you missed. Traffic-light coverage map, auto gap filling.

⚔️

Peer Battle Mode

Challenge friends to real-time quiz battles. Same questions, live scoreboard, bragging rights.

S

For Students

  • ▸AI quiz generator with adaptive difficulty
  • ▸Marksheet analyzer + placement readiness
  • ▸ATS resume checker with AI rewriter
  • ▸RAG gap detector for exam prep
  • ▸Voice calling agent for study nudges
  • ▸Peer battle mode with live scoreboard
  • ▸Spaced repetition calendar
  • ▸Burnout detection + recovery mode

For Faculty

How it works

Three steps. That's it. No setup, no friction.

01
📤

Upload Your Notes

Paste text, upload PDFs, images, or marksheets. Our AI reads everything — even handwritten notes via Gemini Vision.

02
⚡

AI Analyzes Everything

Gemini 1.5 Flash processes your content in seconds. Generates summaries, quizzes, gap analysis, and personalized study plans.

03
🎯

Personalized Plan Delivered

Get a tailored study schedule, adaptive quizzes, and AI-powered interventions. Even phone calls when you need motivation.

S
StudyOS

The AI platform that knows you — your notes, your marks, your gaps, your goals. Built with love + caffeine in 24 hours.

FeaturesFor StudentsFor FacultyGitHub

Built at Hack-A-Sprint 2026 · Sri Aurobindo Group of Institutions, Indore

Powered by Google Gemini · Next.js · Firebase
